1→package com.videodownload.app.ai
     2→
     3→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     5→import okhttp3.*
     6→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     7→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
     8→import org.json.JSONArray
     9→import org.json.JSONObject
    10→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    11→
    12→/**
    13→ * 统一的 AI 客户端
    14→ * 支持多个 AI 提供商的统一调用接口
    15→ */
    16→class AIClient(private val config: AIModelConfig) {
    17→
    18→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    19→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    20→        .readTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    21→        .build()
    22→
    23→    /**
    24→     * 发送聊天请求
    25→     */
    26→    suspend fun chat(prompt: String): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    27→        when (config.provider) {
    28→            AIProvider.OPENAI -> chatOpenAI(prompt)
    29→            AIProvider.ANTHROPIC -> chatAnthropic(prompt)
    30→            AIProvider.GOOGLE -> chatGoogle(prompt)
    31→            AIProvider.ALIBABA -> chatAlibaba(prompt)
    32→            AIProvider.BAIDU -> chatBaidu(prompt)
    33→            AIProvider.ZHIPU -> chatZhipu(prompt)
    34→        }
    35→    }
    36→
    37→    /**
    38→     * OpenAI 格式（兼容 OpenAI、阿里云、智谱）
    39→     */
    40→    private fun chatOpenAI(prompt: String): String {
    41→        val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
    42→            put("model", config.model)
    43→            put("messages", JSONArray().apply {
    44→                put(JSONObject().apply {
    45→                    put("role", "user")
    46→                    put("content", prompt)
    47→                })
    48→            })
    49→            put("temperature", config.temperature)
    50→            put("max_tokens", config.maxTokens)
    51→        }
    52→
    53→        val request = Request.Builder()
    54→            .url("${config.baseUrl}/chat/completions")
    55→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer ${config.apiKey}")
    56→            .addHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
    57→            .post(requestBody.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
    58→            .build()
    59→
    60→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
    61→
    62→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
    63→            throw Exception("API error: ${response.code} - ${response.body?.string()}")
    64→        }
    65→
    66→        val responseBody = response.body?.string()
    67→            ?: throw Exception("Empty response")
    68→
    69→        val jsonResponse = JSONObject(responseBody)
    70→        return jsonResponse
    71→            .getJSONArray("choices")
    72→            .getJSONObject(0)
    73→            .getJSONObject("message")
    74→            .getString("content")
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    /**
    78→     * Anthropic Claude 格式
    79→     */
    80→    private fun chatAnthropic(prompt: String): String {
    81→        val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
    82→            put("model", config.model)
    83→            put("messages", JSONArray().apply {
    84→                put(JSONObject().apply {
    85→                    put("role", "user")
    86→                    put("content", prompt)
    87→                })
    88→            })
    89→            put("max_tokens", config.maxTokens)
    90→            put("temperature", config.temperature)
    91→        }
    92→
    93→        val request = Request.Builder()
    94→            .url("${config.baseUrl}/messages")
    95→            .addHeader("x-api-key", config.apiKey)
    96→            .addHeader("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
    97→            .addHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
    98→            .post(requestBody.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
    99→            .build()
   100→
   101→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   102→
   103→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   104→            throw Exception("API error: ${response.code} - ${response.body?.string()}")
   105→        }
   106→
   107→        val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   108→            ?: throw Exception("Empty response")
   109→
   110→        val jsonResponse = JSONObject(responseBody)
   111→        return jsonResponse
   112→            .getJSONArray("content")
   113→            .getJSONObject(0)
   114→            .getString("text")
   115→    }
   116→
   117→    /**
   118→     * Google Gemini 格式
   119→     */
   120→    private fun chatGoogle(prompt: String): String {
   121→        val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   122→            put("contents", JSONArray().apply {
   123→                put(JSONObject().apply {
   124→                    put("parts", JSONArray().apply {
   125→                        put(JSONObject().apply {
   126→                            put("text", prompt)
   127→                        })
   128→                    })
   129→                })
   130→            })
   131→            put("generationConfig", JSONObject().apply {
   132→                put("temperature", config.temperature)
   133→                put("maxOutputTokens", config.maxTokens)
   134→            })
   135→        }
   136→
   137→        val request = Request.Builder()
   138→            .url("${config.baseUrl}/models/${config.model}:generateContent?key=${config.apiKey}")
   139→            .addHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
   140→            .post(requestBody.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   141→            .build()
   142→
   143→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   144→
   145→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   146→            throw Exception("API error: ${response.code} - ${response.body?.string()}")
   147→        }
   148→
   149→        val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   150→            ?: throw Exception("Empty response")
   151→
   152→        val jsonResponse = JSONObject(responseBody)
   153→        return jsonResponse
   154→            .getJSONArray("candidates")
   155→            .getJSONObject(0)
   156→            .getJSONObject("content")
   157→            .getJSONArray("parts")
   158→            .getJSONObject(0)
   159→            .getString("text")
   160→    }
   161→
   162→    /**
   163→     * 阿里云通义千问（使用 OpenAI 兼容格式）
   164→     */
   165→    private fun chatAlibaba(prompt: String): String {
   166→        return chatOpenAI(prompt)
   167→    }
   168→
   169→    /**
   170→     * 百度文心一言
   171→     */
   172→    private fun chatBaidu(prompt: String): String {
   173→        // 百度需要先获取 access_token，这里简化处理
   174→        // 实际应该先调用 token 接口获取 access_token
   175→        val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   176→            put("messages", JSONArray().apply {
   177→                put(JSONObject().apply {
   178→                    put("role", "user")
   179→                    put("content", prompt)
   180→                })
   181→            })
   182→            put("temperature", config.temperature)
   183→            put("max_output_tokens", config.maxTokens)
   184→        }
   185→
   186→        val request = Request.Builder()
   187→            .url("${config.baseUrl}/wenxinworkshop/chat/completions?access_token=${config.apiKey}")
   188→            .addHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
   189→            .post(requestBody.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   190→            .build()
   191→
   192→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   193→
   194→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   195→            throw Exception("API error: ${response.code} - ${response.body?.string()}")
   196→        }
   197→
   198→        val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   199→            ?: throw Exception("Empty response")
   200→
   201→        val jsonResponse = JSONObject(responseBody)
   202→        return jsonResponse.getString("result")
   203→    }
   204→
   205→    /**
   206→     * 智谱 GLM（使用 OpenAI 兼容格式）
   207→     */
   208→    private fun chatZhipu(prompt: String): String {
   209→        return chatOpenAI(prompt)
   210→    }
   211→
   212→    /**
   213→     * 测试连接
   214→     */
   215→    suspend fun testConnection(): TestResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   216→        try {
   217→            val response = chat("Hello")
   218→            TestResult(success = true, message = "连接成功")
   219→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   220→            TestResult(success = false, message = "连接失败: ${e.message}")
   221→        }
   222→    }
   223→}
   224→
   225→/**
   226→ * 测试结果
   227→ */
   228→data class TestResult(
   229→    val success: Boolean,
   230→    val message: String
   231→)
   232→

1→package com.videodownload.app.service
     2→
     3→import android.app.Notification
     4→import android.app.NotificationChannel
     5→import android.app.NotificationManager
     6→import android.app.PendingIntent
     7→import android.app.Service
     8→import android.content.Intent
     9→import android.os.Build
    10→import android.os.IBinder
    11→import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
    12→import com.videodownload.app.R
    13→import com.videodownload.app.data.model.TranscriptionStatus
    14→import com.videodownload.app.repository.TranscriptionRepository
    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.*
    16→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    17→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    18→
    19→/**
    20→ * 转录前台服务
    21→ *
    22→ * 功能：
    23→ * 1. 后台稳定运行，不被系统杀死
    24→ * 2. 实时更新进度通知
    25→ * 3. 支持取消操作
    26→ * 4. 超时检测和错误处理
    27→ */
    28→class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    29→
    30→    companion object {
    31→        const val ACTION_START = "ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
    32→        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
    33→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_ID = "EXTRA_VIDEO_ID"
    34→        const val EXTRA_ENGINE = "EXTRA_ENGINE"
    35→
    36→        const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001
    37→        const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
    38→
    39→        // 超时时间：每段 5 分钟
    40→        const val SEGMENT_TIMEOUT_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000L
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())
    44→    private var currentJob: Job? = null
    45→
    46→    private lateinit var repository: TranscriptionRepository
    47→    private lateinit var notificationManager: NotificationManager
    48→
    49→    // 进度状态
    50→    private val _progress = MutableStateFlow<TranscriptionProgress?>(null)
    51→    val progress: StateFlow<TranscriptionProgress?> = _progress
    52→
    53→    override fun onCreate() {
    54→        super.onCreate()
    55→        repository = TranscriptionRepository(applicationContext)
    56→        notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
    57→        createNotificationChannel()
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
    61→        when (intent?.action) {
    62→            ACTION_START -> {
    63→                val videoId = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_ID) ?: return START_NOT_STICKY
    64→                val engine = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_ENGINE) ?: "auto"
    65→
    66→                startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification("准备转录...", 0))
    67→                startTranscription(videoId, engine)
    68→            }
    69→            ACTION_CANCEL -> {
    70→                cancelTranscription()
    71→            }
    72→        }
    73→
    74→        return START_STICKY
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder? = null
    78→
    79→    /**
    80→     * 开始转录
    81→     */
    82→    private fun startTranscription(videoId: String, engine: String) {
    83→        currentJob = serviceScope.launch {
    84→            try {
    85→                // 更新状态为转录中
    86→                updateProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
    87→                    videoId = videoId,
    88→                    status = TranscriptionStatus.TRANSCRIBING,
    89→                    progress = 0f,
    90→                    message = "正在转录..."
    91→                ))
    92→
    93→                // 执行转录（带超时检测）
    94→                val result = withTimeout(SEGMENT_TIMEOUT_MS * 10) { // 总超时：50分钟
    95→                    repository.transcribe(
    96→                        videoId = videoId,
    97→                        engine = engine,
    98→                        onProgress = { progress ->
    99→                            updateProgress(progress)
   100→                            updateNotification(progress.message, progress.progress)
   101→                        }
   102→                    )
   103→                }
   104→
   105→                // 转录完成
   106→                updateProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
   107→                    videoId = videoId,
   108→                    status = TranscriptionStatus.COMPLETED,
   109→                    progress = 1f,
   110→                    message = "转录完成"
   111→                ))
   112→
   113→                // 显示完成通知
   114→                showCompletionNotification(videoId, true)
   115→
   116→                // 延迟 2 秒后停止服务
   117→                delay(2000)
   118→                stopSelf()
   119→
   120→            } catch (e: TimeoutCancellationException) {
   121→                // 超时
   122→                handleError(videoId, "转录超时，请重试")
   123→            } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   124→                // 用户取消
   125→                updateProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
   126→                    videoId = videoId,
   127→                    status = TranscriptionStatus.CANCELLED,
   128→                    progress = 0f,
   129→                    message = "已取消"
   130→                ))
   131→                stopSelf()
   132→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   133→                // 其他错误
   134→                handleError(videoId, e.message ?: "转录失败")
   135→            }
   136→        }
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    /**
   140→     * 取消转录
   141→     */
   142→    private fun cancelTranscription() {
   143→        currentJob?.cancel()
   144→        stopSelf()
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    /**
   148→     * 处理错误
   149→     */
   150→    private suspend fun handleError(videoId: String, message: String) {
   151→        updateProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
   152→            videoId = videoId,
   153→            status = TranscriptionStatus.FAILED,
   154→            progress = 0f,
   155→            message = message
   156→        ))
   157→
   158→        // 保存错误状态到数据库
   159→        repository.updateTranscriptionStatus(videoId, TranscriptionStatus.FAILED, message)
   160→
   161→        // 显示失败通知
   162→        showCompletionNotification(videoId, false, message)
   163→
   164→        delay(2000)
   165→        stopSelf()
   166→    }
   167→
   168→    /**
   169→     * 更新进度
   170→     */
   171→    private fun updateProgress(progress: TranscriptionProgress) {
   172→        _progress.value = progress
   173→    }
   174→
   175→    /**
   176→     * 创建通知渠道
   177→     */
   178→    private fun createNotificationChannel() {
   179→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
   180→            val channel = NotificationChannel(
   181→                CHANNEL_ID,
   182→                "转录服务",
   183→                NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_LOW
   184→            ).apply {
   185→                description = "显示视频转录进度"
   186→                setShowBadge(false)
   187→            }
   188→            notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
   189→        }
   190→    }
   191→
   192→    /**
   193→     * 创建通知
   194→     */
   195→    private fun createNotification(message: String, progress: Int): Notification {
   196→        // 取消按钮
   197→        val cancelIntent = Intent(this, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   198→            action = ACTION_CANCEL
   199→        }
   200→        val cancelPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getService(
   201→            this, 0, cancelIntent,
   202→            PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE or PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT
   203→        )
   204→
   205→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   206→            .setContentTitle("视频转录中")
   207→            .setContentText(message)
   208→            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_transcription)
   209→            .setProgress(100, progress, progress == 0)
   210→            .setOngoing(true)
   211→            .addAction(R.drawable.ic_cancel, "取消", cancelPendingIntent)
   212→            .build()
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    /**
   216→     * 更新通知
   217→     */
   218→    private fun updateNotification(message: String, progress: Float) {
   219→        val notification = createNotification(message, (progress * 100).toInt())
   220→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   221→    }
   222→
   223→    /**
   224→     * 显示完成通知
   225→     */
   226→    private fun showCompletionNotification(videoId: String, success: Boolean, error: String? = null) {
   227→        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   228→            .setContentTitle(if (success) "转录完成" else "转录失败")
   229→            .setContentText(if (success) "点击查看转录结果" else error)
   230→            .setSmallIcon(if (success) R.drawable.ic_check else R.drawable.ic_error)
   231→            .setAutoCancel(true)
   232→            .build()
   233→
   234→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID + 1, notification)
   235→    }
   236→
   237→    override fun onDestroy() {
   238→        super.onDestroy()
   239→        currentJob?.cancel()
   240→        serviceScope.cancel()
   241→    }
   242→}
   243→
   244→/**
   245→ * 转录进度
   246→ */
   247→data class TranscriptionProgress(
   248→    val videoId: String,
   249→    val status: TranscriptionStatus,
   250→    val progress: Float, // 0.0 - 1.0
   251→    val message: String,
   252→    val currentSegment: Int = 0,
   253→    val totalSegments: Int = 0
   254→)
   255→

1→package com.videodownload.app.engine
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.videodownload.app.data.model.Word
     5→import com.videodownload.app.repository.TestResult
     6→import com.videodownload.app.repository.TranscriptionResult
     7→import com.videodownload.app.utils.PreferenceManager
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    10→import okhttp3.*
    11→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    12→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.asRequestBody
    13→import org.json.JSONObject
    14→import java.io.File
    15→import java.io.IOException
    16→
    17→/**
    18→ * Groq API 转录引擎（在线）
    19→ *
    20→ * 特点：
    21→ * - 速度快（1-2x 实时）
    22→ * - 准确度高
    23→ * - 支持多语言
    24→ * - 文件大小限制：25MB
    25→ */
    26→class GroqEngine(private val context: Context) : TranscriptionEngine {
    27→
    28→    override val name = "groq"
    29→
    30→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    31→        .connectTimeout(30, java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    32→        .readTimeout(300, java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    33→        .writeTimeout(300, java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    34→        .build()
    35→
    36→    private val preferenceManager = PreferenceManager(context)
    37→
    38→    companion object {
    39→        private const val API_URL = "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions"
    40→        private const val MODEL = "whisper-large-v3-turbo"
    41→        private const val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024 // 25MB
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    override suspend fun transcribe(audioPath: String, language: String?): TranscriptionResult =
    45→        withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    46→            val apiKey = preferenceManager.getGroqApiKey()
    47→                ?: throw IllegalStateException("Groq API Key not configured")
    48→
    49→            val audioFile = File(audioPath)
    50→            if (!audioFile.exists()) {
    51→                throw IllegalArgumentException("Audio file not found: $audioPath")
    52→            }
    53→
    54→            if (audioFile.length() > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    55→                throw IllegalArgumentException("File size exceeds 25MB limit")
    56→            }
    57→
    58→            // 构建请求
    59→            val requestBody = MultipartBody.Builder()
    60→                .setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
    61→                .addFormDataPart(
    62→                    "file",
    63→                    audioFile.name,
    64→                    audioFile.asRequestBody("audio/mpeg".toMediaType())
    65→                )
    66→                .addFormDataPart("model", MODEL)
    67→                .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
    68→                .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
    69→                .apply {
    70→                    if (language != null) {
    71→                        addFormDataPart("language", language)
    72→                    }
    73→                }
    74→                .build()
    75→
    76→            val request = Request.Builder()
    77→                .url(API_URL)
    78→                .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
    79→                .addHeader("User-Agent", "VideoDownloadApp/1.0")
    80→                .post(requestBody)
    81→                .build()
    82→
    83→            // 发送请求
    84→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
    85→
    86→            if (!response.isSuccessful) {
    87→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
    88→                throw IOException("Groq API error: ${response.code} - $errorBody")
    89→            }
    90→
    91→            // 解析响应
    92→            val responseBody = response.body?.string()
    93→                ?: throw IOException("Empty response from Groq API")
    94→
    95→            parseResponse(responseBody)
    96→        }
    97→
    98→    /**
    99→     * 解析 Groq API 响应
   100→     */
   101→    private fun parseResponse(json: String): TranscriptionResult {
   102→        val jsonObject = JSONObject(json)
   103→
   104→        val text = jsonObject.getString("text")
   105→        val language = jsonObject.optString("language", "unknown")
   106→        val duration = jsonObject.optDouble("duration", 0.0).toFloat()
   107→
   108→        // 解析词级时间戳
   109→        val words = mutableListOf<Word>()
   110→        val wordsArray = jsonObject.optJSONArray("words")
   111→        if (wordsArray != null) {
   112→            for (i in 0 until wordsArray.length()) {
   113→                val wordObj = wordsArray.getJSONObject(i)
   114→                words.add(
   115→                    Word(
   116→                        word = wordObj.getString("word"),
   117→                        start = wordObj.getDouble("start").toFloat(),
   118→                        end = wordObj.getDouble("end").toFloat(),
   119→                        confidence = null
   120→                    )
   121→                )
   122→            }
   123→        }
   124→
   125→        return TranscriptionResult(
   126→            text = text,
   127→            words = words,
   128→            language = language,
   129→            duration = duration
   130→        )
   131→    }
   132→
   133→    override fun isAvailable(): Boolean {
   134→        return preferenceManager.getGroqApiKey() != null
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    override suspend fun test(apiKey: String?): TestResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   138→        try {
   139→            val testKey = apiKey?.trim() ?: preferenceManager.getGroqApiKey()
   140→                ?: return@withContext TestResult(false, "API Key not configured")
   141→
   142→            // 验证 API Key 格式
   143→            if (testKey.isBlank()) {
   144→                return@withContext TestResult(false, "API Key 不能为空")
   145→            }
   146→
   147→            if (!testKey.startsWith("gsk_")) {
   148→                return@withContext TestResult(false, "API Key 格式错误（应以 gsk_ 开头）")
   149→            }
   150→
   151→            // 发送测试请求（获取模型列表）
   152→            val request = Request.Builder()
   153→                .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/models")
   154→                .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $testKey")
   155→                .addHeader("User-Agent", "VideoDownloadApp/1.0")
   156→                .addHeader("Accept", "application/json")
   157→                .get()
   158→                .build()
   159→
   160→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   161→
   162→            if (response.isSuccessful) {
   163→                // 保存 API Key
   164→                if (apiKey != null) {
   165→                    preferenceManager.setGroqApiKey(apiKey)
   166→                }
   167→                TestResult(true, "连接成功")
   168→            } else {
   169→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   170→                TestResult(false, "连接失败 (${response.code}): $errorBody")
   171→            }
   172→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   173→            TestResult(false, "连接失败: ${e.message}")
   174→        }
   175→    }
   176→}
   177→

1→package com.videodownload.app.repository
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.videodownload.app.data.AppDatabase
     5→import com.videodownload.app.data.model.*
     6→import com.videodownload.app.engine.GroqEngine
     7→import com.videodownload.app.engine.WhisperCppEngine
     8→import com.videodownload.app.engine.TranscriptionEngine
     9→import com.videodownload.app.service.TranscriptionProgress
    10→import com.videodownload.app.utils.AudioSegmenter
    11→import com.videodownload.app.utils.FFmpegHelper
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    14→import java.io.File
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * 转录仓库
    18→ *
    19→ * 功能：
    20→ * 1. 管理转录引擎
    21→ * 2. 执行分段转录
    22→ * 3. 保存和读取转录结果
    23→ * 4. 断点续传
    24→ */
    25→class TranscriptionRepository(private val context: Context) {
    26→
    27→    private val database = AppDatabase.getInstance(context)
    28→    private val transcriptionDao = database.transcriptionDao()
    29→    private val videoDao = database.videoDao()
    30→
    31→    private val groqEngine = GroqEngine(context)
    32→    private val whisperCppEngine = WhisperCppEngine(context)
    33→    private val audioSegmenter = AudioSegmenter(context)
    34→    private val ffmpegHelper = FFmpegHelper(context)
    35→
    36→    /**
    37→     * 转录视频
    38→     *
    39→     * @param videoId 视频 ID
    40→     * @param engine 引擎类型：auto/groq/whisper_cpp
    41→     * @param onProgress 进度回调
    42→     */
    43→    suspend fun transcribe(
    44→        videoId: String,
    45→        engine: String = "auto",
    46→        onProgress: (TranscriptionProgress) -> Unit
    47→    ): TranscriptionEntity = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    48→
    49→        // 1. 检查是否已有转录结果
    50→        val existing = transcriptionDao.getTranscription(videoId)
    51→        if (existing != null && existing.status == TranscriptionStatus.COMPLETED) {
    52→            // 已有完整转录结果，直接返回
    53→            return@withContext existing
    54→        }
    55→
    56→        // 2. 获取视频信息
    57→        val video = videoDao.getVideo(videoId)
    58→            ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("Video not found: $videoId")
    59→
    60→        // 3. 提取音频
    61→        onProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
    62→            videoId = videoId,
    63→            status = TranscriptionStatus.EXTRACTING,
    64→            progress = 0.05f,
    65→            message = "正在提取音频..."
    66→        ))
    67→
    68→        val audioPath = ffmpegHelper.extractAudio(video.localPath ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("Video not downloaded yet"))
    69→
    70→        // 4. 分段
    71→        onProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
    72→            videoId = videoId,
    73→            status = TranscriptionStatus.SEGMENTING,
    74→            progress = 0.1f,
    75→            message = "正在分析音频..."
    76→        ))
    77→
    78→        val segments = audioSegmenter.segment(audioPath)
    79→
    80→        // 5. 选择引擎
    81→        val selectedEngine = selectEngine(engine, audioPath)
    82→
    83→        // 6. 转录各段
    84→        onProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
    85→            videoId = videoId,
    86→            status = TranscriptionStatus.TRANSCRIBING,
    87→            progress = 0.15f,
    88→            message = "正在转录 (0/${segments.size})",
    89→            currentSegment = 0,
    90→            totalSegments = segments.size
    91→        ))
    92→
    93→        val results = mutableListOf<TranscriptionResult>()
    94→
    95→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
    96→            // 转录单段
    97→            val result = transcribeSegment(
    98→                segment = segment,
    99→                engine = selectedEngine,
   100→                videoId = videoId,
   101→                index = index
   102→            )
   103→
   104→            results.add(result)
   105→
   106→            // 更新进度
   107→            val progress = 0.15f + (index + 1).toFloat() / segments.size * 0.8f
   108→            onProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
   109→                videoId = videoId,
   110→                status = TranscriptionStatus.TRANSCRIBING,
   111→                progress = progress,
   112→                message = "正在转录 (${index + 1}/${segments.size})",
   113→                currentSegment = index + 1,
   114→                totalSegments = segments.size
   115→            ))
   116→        }
   117→
   118→        // 7. 合并结果
   119→        val mergedResult = mergeResults(results)
   120→
   121→        // 8. 保存到数据库
   122→        val transcription = TranscriptionEntity(
   123→            videoId = videoId,
   124→            text = mergedResult.text,
   125→            words = mergedResult.words,
   126→            language = mergedResult.language,
   127→            engine = selectedEngine.name,
   128→            status = TranscriptionStatus.COMPLETED,
   129→            createdAt = System.currentTimeMillis(),
   130→            updatedAt = System.currentTimeMillis(),
   131→            duration = mergedResult.duration,
   132→            segments = segments.mapIndexed { index, seg ->
   133→                Segment(
   134→                    index = index,
   135→                    startTime = seg.startTime,
   136→                    endTime = seg.endTime,
   137→                    text = results[index].text,
   138→                    status = SegmentStatus.COMPLETED
   139→                )
   140→            }
   141→        )
   142→
   143→        transcriptionDao.insertTranscription(transcription)
   144→
   145→        // 9. 清理临时文件
   146→        cleanupTempFiles(audioPath, segments)
   147→
   148→        onProgress(TranscriptionProgress(
   149→            videoId = videoId,
   150→            status = TranscriptionStatus.COMPLETED,
   151→            progress = 1f,
   152→            message = "转录完成"
   153→        ))
   154→
   155→        return@withContext transcription
   156→    }
   157→
   158→    /**
   159→     * 转录单个分段（带重试）
   160→     */
   161→    private suspend fun transcribeSegment(
   162→        segment: AudioSegment,
   163→        engine: TranscriptionEngine,
   164→        videoId: String,
   165→        index: Int,
   166→        maxRetries: Int = 3
   167→    ): TranscriptionResult {
   168→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   169→
   170→        repeat(maxRetries) { attempt ->
   171→            try {
   172→                return engine.transcribe(segment.path, null)
   173→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   174→                lastError = e
   175→                if (attempt < maxRetries - 1) {
   176→                    // 等待后重试
   177→                    kotlinx.coroutines.delay(1000L * (attempt + 1))
   178→                }
   179→            }
   180→        }
   181→
   182→        // 所有重试都失败
   183→        throw lastError ?: Exception("Transcription failed for segment $index")
   184→    }
   185→
   186→    /**
   187→     * 选择转录引擎
   188→     */
   189→    private fun selectEngine(engineType: String, audioPath: String): TranscriptionEngine {
   190→        return when (engineType.lowercase()) {
   191→            "groq" -> groqEngine
   192→            "whisper_cpp" -> whisperCppEngine
   193→            "auto" -> {
   194→                // 自动选择：文件 < 20MB 且有网络 -> Groq，否则 -> WhisperCpp
   195→                val fileSize = File(audioPath).length()
   196→                val hasNetwork = isNetworkAvailable()
   197→
   198→                if (fileSize < 20 * 1024 * 1024 && hasNetwork && groqEngine.isAvailable()) {
   199→                    groqEngine
   200→                } else {
   201→                    whisperCppEngine
   202→                }
   203→            }
   204→            else -> groqEngine
   205→        }
   206→    }
   207→
   208→    /**
   209→     * 合并转录结果
   210→     */
   211→    private fun mergeResults(results: List<TranscriptionResult>): TranscriptionResult {
   212→        val allWords = mutableListOf<Word>()
   213→        val allText = StringBuilder()
   214→
   215→        results.forEach { result ->
   216→            allText.append(result.text).append(" ")
   217→            allWords.addAll(result.words)
   218→        }
   219→
   220→        return TranscriptionResult(
   221→            text = allText.toString().trim(),
   222→            words = allWords,
   223→            language = results.firstOrNull()?.language ?: "unknown",
   224→            duration = allWords.lastOrNull()?.end ?: 0f
   225→        )
   226→    }
   227→
   228→    /**
   229→     * 获取转录结果
   230→     */
   231→    suspend fun getTranscription(videoId: String): TranscriptionEntity? {
   232→        return transcriptionDao.getTranscription(videoId)
   233→    }
   234→
   235→    /**
   236→     * 删除转录结果（用于重新转录）
   237→     */
   238→    suspend fun deleteTranscription(videoId: String) {
   239→        transcriptionDao.deleteTranscription(videoId)
   240→    }
   241→
   242→    /**
   243→     * 更新转录状态
   244→     */
   245→    suspend fun updateTranscriptionStatus(
   246→        videoId: String,
   247→        status: TranscriptionStatus,
   248→        errorMessage: String? = null
   249→    ) {
   250→        transcriptionDao.updateStatus(videoId, status, errorMessage)
   251→    }
   252→
   253→    /**
   254→     * 测试引擎连接
   255→     */
   256→    suspend fun testEngine(engineType: String, apiKey: String? = null): TestResult {
   257→        return when (engineType.lowercase()) {
   258→            "groq" -> groqEngine.test(apiKey)
   259→            "whisper_cpp" -> whisperCppEngine.test(null)
   260→            else -> TestResult(false, "Unknown engine type")
   261→        }
   262→    }
   263→
   264→    /**
   265→     * 检查网络连接
   266→     */
   267→    private fun isNetworkAvailable(): Boolean {
   268→        val connectivityManager = context.getSystemService(Context.CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE)
   269→            as android.net.ConnectivityManager
   270→        val network = connectivityManager.activeNetwork ?: return false
   271→        val capabilities = connectivityManager.getNetworkCapabilities(network) ?: return false
   272→        return capabilities.hasCapability(android.net.NetworkCapabilities.NET_CAPABILITY_INTERNET)
   273→    }
   274→
   275→    /**
   276→     * 清理临时文件
   277→     */
   278→    private fun cleanupTempFiles(audioPath: String, segments: List<AudioSegment>) {
   279→        try {
   280→            File(audioPath).delete()
   281→            segments.forEach { segment ->
   282→                File(segment.path).delete()
   283→            }
   284→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   285→            // 忽略清理错误
   286→        }
   287→    }
   288→}
   289→
   290→/**
   291→ * 转录结果
   292→ */
   293→data class TranscriptionResult(
   294→    val text: String,
   295→    val words: List<Word>,
   296→    val language: String,
   297→    val duration: Float
   298→)
   299→
   300→/**
   301→ * 音频分段
   302→ */
   303→data class AudioSegment(
   304→    val path: String,
   305→    val startTime: Float,
   306→    val endTime: Float
   307→)
   308→
   309→/**
   310→ * 测试结果
   311→ */
   312→data class TestResult(
   313→    val success: Boolean,
   314→    val message: String
   315→)
   316→

1→package com.videodownload.app.utils
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.videodownload.app.repository.AudioSegment
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     7→import java.io.File
     8→import kotlin.math.ceil
     9→import kotlin.math.min
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * 音频分段器
    13→ */
    14→class AudioSegmenter(private val context: Context) {
    15→
    16→    private val ffmpegHelper = FFmpegHelper(context)
    17→
    18→    companion object {
    19→        const val MAX_SEGMENT_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024 // 20MB
    20→        const val SEGMENT_DURATION = 600f // 10分钟
    21→    }
    22→
    23→    /**
    24→     * 分段音频
    25→     */
    26→    suspend fun segment(audioPath: String): List<AudioSegment> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    27→        val audioFile = File(audioPath)
    28→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    29→        val duration = ffmpegHelper.getAudioDuration(audioPath)
    30→
    31→        if (fileSize <= MAX_SEGMENT_SIZE) {
    32→            // 单段，无需切分
    33→            return@withContext listOf(AudioSegment(audioPath, 0f, duration))
    34→        }
    35→
    36→        // 多段切分
    37→        segmentBySize(audioPath, fileSize, duration)
    38→    }
    39→
    40→    /**
    41→     * 按文件大小切分
    42→     */
    43→    private suspend fun segmentBySize(
    44→        audioPath: String,
    45→        fileSize: Long,
    46→        duration: Float
    47→    ): List<AudioSegment> {
    48→        val segmentCount = ceil(fileSize.toDouble() / MAX_SEGMENT_SIZE).toInt()
    49→        val segmentDuration = duration / segmentCount
    50→
    51→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
    52→
    53→        for (index in 0 until segmentCount) {
    54→            val startTime = index * segmentDuration
    55→            val endTime = min((index + 1) * segmentDuration, duration)
    56→
    57→            val segmentPath = "${audioPath}_segment_${index}.mp3"
    58→
    59→            ffmpegHelper.extractSegment(audioPath, startTime, endTime, segmentPath)
    60→
    61→            segments.add(AudioSegment(segmentPath, startTime, endTime))
    62→        }
    63→
    64→        return segments
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    /**
    68→     * 在静音点切分（可选）
    69→     */
    70→    suspend fun segmentAtSilence(audioPath: String): List<AudioSegment> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    71→        val duration = ffmpegHelper.getAudioDuration(audioPath)
    72→        val silencePoints = ffmpegHelper.detectSilence(audioPath)
    73→
    74→        if (silencePoints.isEmpty()) {
    75→            // 没有静音点，按大小切分
    76→            return@withContext segment(audioPath)
    77→        }
    78→
    79→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
    80→        var lastCutPoint = 0f
    81→        var currentSize = 0L
    82→
    83→        silencePoints.forEach { silenceTime ->
    84→            val estimatedSize = estimateSegmentSize(audioPath, lastCutPoint, silenceTime)
    85→
    86→            if (currentSize + estimatedSize > MAX_SEGMENT_SIZE) {
    87→                // 在此静音点切分
    88→                val segmentPath = "${audioPath}_segment_${segments.size}.mp3"
    89→                ffmpegHelper.extractSegment(audioPath, lastCutPoint, silenceTime, segmentPath)
    90→
    91→                segments.add(AudioSegment(segmentPath, lastCutPoint, silenceTime))
    92→
    93→                lastCutPoint = silenceTime
    94→                currentSize = 0L
    95→            } else {
    96→                currentSize += estimatedSize
    97→            }
    98→        }
    99→
   100→        // 添加最后一段
   101→        if (lastCutPoint < duration) {
   102→            val segmentPath = "${audioPath}_segment_${segments.size}.mp3"
   103→            ffmpegHelper.extractSegment(audioPath, lastCutPoint, duration, segmentPath)
   104→
   105→            segments.add(AudioSegment(segmentPath, lastCutPoint, duration))
   106→        }
   107→
   108→        segments
   109→    }
   110→
   111→    /**
   112→     * 估算片段大小
   113→     */
   114→    private suspend fun estimateSegmentSize(audioPath: String, startTime: Float, endTime: Float): Long {
   115→        val audioFile = File(audioPath)
   116→        val duration = endTime - startTime
   117→        val totalDuration = ffmpegHelper.getAudioDuration(audioPath)
   118→
   119→        return (audioFile.length() * (duration / totalDuration)).toLong()
   120→    }
   121→}
   122→

    16→/**

    26→ */
    27→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    28→@Composable
    29→fun TranscriptionScreen(
    30→    videoId: String,
    31→    videoTitle: String,

    44→    // 转录完成后自动退出

    58→                        Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, "返回")
    59→                    }
    60→                }
    61→            )
    62→        }
    63→    ) { padding ->
    64→        Column(
    65→            modifier = Modifier
    66→                .fillMaxSize()
    67→                .padding(padding)
    68→                .padding(16.dp)
    69→                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState()),
    70→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)

    72→            // 视频信息

    83→                }
    84→
    85→                is TranscriptionUiState.Transcribing -> {

    91→
    92→                is TranscriptionUiState.Completed -> {

    97→                        }

   121→@Composable
   122→private fun VideoInfoCard(title: String) {

   124→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   125→    ) {

   128→        ) {

   133→            )

   250→/**
   251→ * 转录中内容

   253→@Composable
   254→private fun TranscribingContent(
   255→    progress: com.videodownload.app.service.TranscriptionProgress?,
   256→    onCancel: () -> Unit
   257→) {
   258→    Card(
   259→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   260→    ) {

   262→            modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
   263→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
   264→        ) {

   266→            Row(
   267→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically

   269→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   270→                    modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
   271→                    strokeWidth = 2.dp
   272→                )
   273→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   274→                Text(
   275→                    text = "转录中...",
   276→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   277→                )
   278→            }
   279→
   280→            // 进度信息

   283→                    // 进度条
   284→                    LinearProgressIndicator(
   285→                        progress = progress.progress,

   287→                    )
   288→
   289→                    // 进度文本

   296→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   297→                        )
   298→                        Text(
   299→                            text = "${(progress.progress * 100).toInt()}%",
   300→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   301→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
   302→                        )
   303→                    }
   304→
   305→                    // 分段信息
   306→                    if (progress.totalSegments > 0) {
   307→                        Text(
   308→                            text = "分段: ${progress.currentSegment}/${progress.totalSegments}",
   309→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,

   311→                        )
   312→                    }
   313→                }
   314→            }
   315→
   316→            // 取消按钮
   317→            OutlinedButton(
   318→                onClick = onCancel,
   319→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   320→            ) {
   321→                Icon(Icons.Default.Close, contentDescription = null)

   330→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   331→            )
   332→        }
   333→    }
   334→}

    16→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    17→@Composable
    18→fun VideoDetailScreen(
    19→    videoId: String,
    20→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    21→    onNavigateToTranscription: (String, String) -> Unit,
    22→    viewModel: VideoDetailViewModel = viewModel()
    23→) {
    24→    val video by viewModel.video.collectAsState()
    25→    val transcription by viewModel.transcription.collectAsState()
    26→
    27→    LaunchedEffect(videoId) {
    28→        viewModel.loadVideo(videoId)
    29→        viewModel.loadTranscription(videoId)
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    Scaffold(
    33→        topBar = {
    34→            TopAppBar(
    35→                title = { Text("视频详情") },
    36→                navigationIcon = {
    37→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
    38→                        Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, "返回")
    39→                    }
    40→                }
    41→            )
    42→        }
    43→    ) { padding ->
    44→        Column(
    45→            modifier = Modifier
    46→                .fillMaxSize()
    47→                .padding(padding)
    48→                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
    49→                .padding(16.dp),
    50→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
    51→        ) {
    52→            video?.let { videoData ->
    53→                // 视频信息卡片
    54→                VideoInfoCard(videoData)
    55→
    56→                // 转录按钮
    57→                if (transcription == null) {
    58→                    Button(
    59→                        onClick = {
    60→                            onNavigateToTranscription(videoId, videoData.title)
    61→                        },
    62→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
    63→                    ) {
    64→                        Icon(Icons.Default.Subtitles, contentDescription = null)
    65→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
    66→                        Text("开始转录")
    67→                    }
    68→                } else {
    69→                    // 显示转录结果
    70→                    TranscriptionResultCard(
    71→                        transcription = transcription!!,
    72→                        onRetry = {
    73→                            onNavigateToTranscription(videoId, videoData.title)
    74→                        }
    75→                    )
    76→                }
    77→            }
    78→        }
    79→    }
    80→}

    82→@Composable
    83→private fun VideoInfoCard(video: com.videodownload.app.data.model.VideoEntity) {
    84→    Card(
    85→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
    86→    ) {
    87→        Column(

    89→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)

    99→            ) {

   111→            if (video.localPath != null) {

   129→        }

   133→@Composable
   134→private fun InfoChip(icon: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector, text: String) {
   135→    Surface(
   136→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant,
   137→        shape = MaterialTheme.shapes.small
   138→    ) {
   139→        Row(

   141→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,

   157→@Composable
   158→private fun TranscriptionResultCard(
   159→    transcription: com.videodownload.app.data.model.TranscriptionEntity,
   160→    onRetry: () -> Unit
   161→) {
   162→    Card(
   163→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()

   165→        Column(
   166→            modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
   167→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)
   168→        ) {
   169→            Row(
   170→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   171→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   172→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   173→            ) {
   174→                Text(
   175→                    text = "转录结果",
   176→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   177→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   178→                )
   179→
   180→                TextButton(onClick = onRetry) {
   181→                    Icon(
   182→                        Icons.Default.Refresh,
   183→                        contentDescription = null,
   184→                        modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   185→                    )
   186→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   187→                    Text("重新转录")
   188→                }
   189→            }
   190→
   191→            Row(
   192→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   193→            ) {
   194→                InfoChip(
   195→                    icon = Icons.Default.Language,
   196→                    text = transcription.language
   197→                )
   198→
   199→                InfoChip(
   200→                    icon = Icons.Default.Cloud,
   201→                    text = transcription.engine
   202→                )
   203→            }
   204→
   205→            Divider()
   206→
   207→            Text(
   208→                text = transcription.text,
   209→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   210→            )
   211→        }
   212→    }
   213→}
   214→
   215→private fun formatDuration(seconds: Float): String {
   216→    val minutes = (seconds / 60).toInt()
   217→    val secs = (seconds % 60).toInt()
   218→    return String.format("%d:%02d", minutes, secs)
   219→}

    18→/**
    19→ * 视频解析界面
    20→ */

    23→fun VideoParserScreen(
    24→    viewModel: VideoParserViewModel = viewModel()
    25→) {

    28→    Scaffold(

    32→            )

    37→                .fillMaxSize()
    38→                .padding(paddingValues)

    40→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)

    90→
    91→@Composable
    92→fun VideoInfoCard(
    93→    videoInfo: VideoInfo,
    94→    selectedFormat: VideoFormat?,
    95→    onFormatSelected: (VideoFormat) -> Unit,
    96→    onDownload: () -> Unit,
    97→    downloadProgress: Int,
    98→    isDownloading: Boolean
    99→) {
   100→    Card(
   101→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   102→    ) {
   103→        Column(
   104→            modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
   105→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   106→        ) {
   107→            Text(
   108→                text = videoInfo.title,
   109→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   110→            )
   111→
   112→            Text(
   113→                text = "作者: ${videoInfo.author ?: "未知"}",
   114→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   115→            )
   116→
   117→            Text(
   118→                text = "平台: ${videoInfo.platform}",
   119→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   120→            )
   121→
   122→            Text(
   123→                text = "时长: ${formatDuration(videoInfo.duration)}",
   124→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   125→            )
   126→
   127→            if (videoInfo.viewCount != null) {
   128→                Text(
   129→                    text = "观看: ${formatNumber(videoInfo.viewCount)}",
   130→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   131→                )
   132→            }
   133→
   134→            Divider(modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 8.dp))
   135→
   136→            Text(
   137→                text = "可用格式:",
   138→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall
   139→            )
   140→
   141→            LazyColumn(
   142→                modifier = Modifier.height(200.dp),
   143→                verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   144→            ) {
   145→                items(videoInfo.formats) { format ->
   146→                    FormatItem(
   147→                        format = format,
   148→                        isSelected = format == selectedFormat,
   149→                        onClick = { onFormatSelected(format) }
   150→                    )
   151→                }
   152→            }
   153→
   154→            if (isDownloading) {
   155→                Column(
   156→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   157→                ) {
   158→                    LinearProgressIndicator(
   159→                        progress = downloadProgress / 100f,
   160→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   161→                    )
   162→                    Text(
   163→                        text = "下载进度: $downloadProgress%",
   164→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall
   165→                    )
   166→                }
   167→            } else {
   168→                Button(
   169→                    onClick = onDownload,
   170→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   171→                    enabled = selectedFormat != null
   172→                ) {
   173→                    Text("下载")
   174→                }
   175→            }
   176→        }
   177→    }
   178→}
   179→
   180→@Composable
   181→fun FormatItem(
   182→    format: VideoFormat,
   183→    isSelected: Boolean,
   184→    onClick: () -> Unit
   185→) {
   186→    Card(
   187→        onClick = onClick,
   188→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   189→            containerColor = if (isSelected) {
   190→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
   191→            } else {
   192→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   193→            }
   194→        )
   195→    ) {
   196→        Row(
   197→            modifier = Modifier
   198→                .fillMaxWidth()
   199→                .padding(12.dp),
   200→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   201→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   202→        ) {
   203→            Column {
   204→                Text(
   205→                    text = format.quality,
   206→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   207→                )
   208→                Text(
   209→                    text = "${format.ext.uppercase()} ${if (format.isDash) "(DASH)" else ""}",
   210→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall
   211→                )
   212→            }
   213→
   214→            if (format.fileSize != null) {
   215→                Text(
   216→                    text = formatFileSize(format.fileSize),
   217→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall
   218→                )
   219→            }
   220→        }
   221→    }
   222→}
   223→
   224→private fun formatDuration(seconds: Long): String {
   225→    val hours = seconds / 3600
   226→    val minutes = (seconds % 3600) / 60
   227→    val secs = seconds % 60
   228→
   229→    return if (hours > 0) {
   230→        String.format("%d:%02d:%02d", hours, minutes, secs)
   231→    } else {
   232→        String.format("%d:%02d", minutes, secs)
   233→    }
   234→}
   235→
   236→private fun formatNumber(number: Long): String {
   237→    return when {
   238→        number >= 100_000_000 -> String.format("%.1f亿", number / 100_000_000.0)
   239→        number >= 10_000 -> String.format("%.1f万", number / 10_000.0)
   240→        else -> number.toString()
   241→    }
   242→}
   243→
   244→private fun formatFileSize(bytes: Long): String {
   245→    return when {
   246→        bytes < 1024 -> "$bytes B"
   247→        bytes < 1024 * 1024 -> String.format("%.2f KB", bytes / 1024.0)
   248→        bytes < 1024 * 1024 * 1024 -> String.format("%.2f MB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024))
   249→        else -> String.format("%.2f GB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024 * 1024))
   250→    }
   251→}

    18→/**
    19→ * 设置界面
    20→ *
    21→ * 功能：
    22→ * 1. 配置 API Key
    23→ * 2. 测试转录引擎连接
    24→ * 3. 选择默认引擎
    25→ * 4. 下载离线模型
    26→ * 5. AI 模型选择和配置
    27→ */
    28→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    29→@Composable
    30→fun SettingsScreen(
    31→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    32→    viewModel: SettingsViewModel = viewModel()
    33→) {

    35→    val settings by viewModel.settings.collectAsState()

    46→            )
    47→        }

    51→                .fillMaxSize()

    56→        ) {

    93→/**
    94→ * AI 模型配置
    95→ */
    96→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    97→@Composable
    98→private fun AIModelConfigSection(
    99→    settings: AppSettings,
   100→    uiState: SettingsUiState,
   101→    onProviderChange: (AIProvider) -> Unit,
   102→    onApiKeyChange: (String) -> Unit,
   103→    onBaseUrlChange: (String) -> Unit,
   104→    onModelChange: (String) -> Unit,
   105→    onResetToDefault: () -> Unit,
   106→    onTestConnection: () -> Unit
   107→) {
   108→    var apiKey by remember(settings.aiApiKey) { mutableStateOf(settings.aiApiKey ?: "") }
   109→    var baseUrl by remember(settings.aiBaseUrl) { mutableStateOf(settings.aiBaseUrl) }
   110→    var model by remember(settings.aiModel) { mutableStateOf(settings.aiModel) }
   111→    var showApiKey by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   112→    var showProviderMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   113→
   114→    Card(
   115→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   116→    ) {
   117→        Column(
   118→            modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
   119→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)
   120→        ) {
   121→            Text(
   122→                text = "AI 模型配置",
   123→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   124→            )
   125→
   126→            // 提供商选择
   127→            ExposedDropdownMenuBox(
   128→                expanded = showProviderMenu,
   129→                onExpandedChange = { showProviderMenu = it }
   130→            ) {
   131→                OutlinedTextField(
   132→                    value = settings.aiProvider.displayName,
   133→                    onValueChange = {},
   134→                    readOnly = true,
   135→                    label = { Text("AI 提供商") },
   136→                    trailingIcon = { ExposedDropdownMenuDefaults.TrailingIcon(expanded = showProviderMenu) },
   137→                    modifier = Modifier
   138→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   139→                        .menuAnchor()
   140→                )
   141→
   142→                ExposedDropdownMenu(
   143→                    expanded = showProviderMenu,
   144→                    onDismissRequest = { showProviderMenu = false }
   145→                ) {
   146→                    AIProvider.entries.forEach { provider ->
   147→                        DropdownMenuItem(
   148→                            text = { Text(provider.displayName) },
   149→                            onClick = {
   150→                                onProviderChange(provider)
   151→                                showProviderMenu = false
   152→                            }
   153→                        )
   154→                    }
   155→                }
   156→            }
   157→
   158→            // API Key 输入
   159→            OutlinedTextField(
   160→                value = apiKey,
   161→                onValueChange = {
   162→                    apiKey = it
   163→                    onApiKeyChange(it)
   164→                },
   165→                label = { Text("API Key") },
   166→                placeholder = { Text(getApiKeyPlaceholder(settings.aiProvider)) },
   167→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   168→                visualTransformation = if (showApiKey) {
   169→                    VisualTransformation.None
   170→                } else {
   171→                    PasswordVisualTransformation()
   172→                },
   173→                trailingIcon = {
   174→                    IconButton(onClick = { showApiKey = !showApiKey }) {
   175→                        Icon(
   176→                            if (showApiKey) Icons.Default.Visibility else Icons.Default.VisibilityOff,
   177→                            contentDescription = if (showApiKey) "隐藏" else "显示"
   178→                        )
   179→                    }
   180→                },
   181→                supportingText = {
   182→                    Text(getApiKeyHint(settings.aiProvider))
   183→                }
   184→            )
   185→
   186→            // Base URL 输入
   187→            OutlinedTextField(
   188→                value = baseUrl,
   189→                onValueChange = {
   190→                    baseUrl = it
   191→                    onBaseUrlChange(it)
   192→                },
   193→                label = { Text("Base URL") },
   194→                placeholder = { Text(settings.aiProvider.defaultBaseUrl) },
   195→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   196→                supportingText = {
   197→                    Text("自定义 API 端点（可选）")
   198→                }
   199→            )
   200→
   201→            // 模型输入
   202→            OutlinedTextField(
   203→                value = model,
   204→                onValueChange = {
   205→                    model = it
   206→                    onModelChange(it)
   207→                },
   208→                label = { Text("模型") },
   209→                placeholder = { Text(settings.aiProvider.defaultModel) },
   210→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   211→                supportingText = {
   212→                    Text("默认: ${settings.aiProvider.defaultModel}")
   213→                }
   214→            )
   215→
   216→            // 操作按钮
   217→            Row(
   218→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   219→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   220→            ) {
   221→                OutlinedButton(
   222→                    onClick = onResetToDefault,
   223→                    modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
   224→                ) {
   225→                    Icon(Icons.Default.Refresh, contentDescription = null)
   226→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   227→                    Text("重置")
   228→                }
   229→
   230→                Button(
   231→                    onClick = onTestConnection,
   232→                    modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
   233→                    enabled = apiKey.isNotBlank() && uiState !is SettingsUiState.Testing
   234→                ) {
   235→                    if (uiState is SettingsUiState.Testing) {
   236→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   237→                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   238→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp,
   239→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary
   240→                        )
   241→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   242→                        Text("测试中...")
   243→                    } else {
   244→                        Icon(Icons.Default.CheckCircle, contentDescription = null)
   245→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   246→                        Text("测试")
   247→                    }
   248→                }
   249→            }
   250→
   251→            // 测试结果
   252→            when (uiState) {
   253→                is SettingsUiState.TestSuccess -> {
   254→                    Card(
   255→                        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   256→                            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
   257→                        )
   258→                    ) {
   259→                        Row(
   260→                            modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp),
   261→                            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   262→                        ) {
   263→                            Icon(
   264→                                Icons.Default.CheckCircle,
   265→                                contentDescription = null,
   266→                                tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   267→                            )
   268→                            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   269→                            Text(
   270→                                text = uiState.message,
   271→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium
   272→                            )
   273→                        }
   274→                    }
   275→                }
   276→
   277→                is SettingsUiState.TestFailed -> {
   278→                    Card(
   279→                        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   280→                            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer
   281→                        )
   282→                    ) {

    30→        private const val BUFFER_SIZE = 8192
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    /**
    34→     * 下载进度
    35→     */
    36→    data class DownloadProgress(
    37→        val bytesDownloaded: Long,
    38→        val totalBytes: Long,
    39→        val percentage: Int,
    40→        val speed: Long, // bytes per second
    41→        val status: Status
    42→    ) {
    43→        enum class Status {
    44→            DOWNLOADING,
    45→            MERGING,
    46→            COMPLETED,
    47→            FAILED
    48→        }
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    /**
    52→     * 下载视频
    53→     * @param format 视频格式
    54→     * @param audioFormat 音频格式（DASH 格式需要）
    55→     * @param outputFile 输出文件
    56→     * @param headers 额外的 HTTP 头（如 Referer）
    57→     * @return 下载进度流
    58→     */
    59→    fun downloadVideo(
    60→        format: VideoFormat,
    61→        audioFormat: AudioFormat?,
    62→        outputFile: File,
    63→        headers: Map<String, String> = emptyMap()
    64→    ): Flow<DownloadProgress> = flow {
    65→        try {
    66→            if (format.isDash && audioFormat != null) {
    67→                // DASH 格式：需要分别下载视频和音频，然后合并
    68→                downloadDashVideo(format, audioFormat, outputFile, headers) { progress ->
    69→                    emit(progress)
    70→                }
    71→            } else {
    72→                // 普通格式：直接下载
    73→                downloadFile(format.url, outputFile, headers) { progress ->
    74→                    emit(progress)
    75→                }
    76→            }
    77→
    78→            emit(
    79→                DownloadProgress(
    80→                    bytesDownloaded = outputFile.length(),
    81→                    totalBytes = outputFile.length(),
    82→                    percentage = 100,
    83→                    speed = 0,
    84→                    status = DownloadProgress.Status.COMPLETED
    85→                )
    86→            )
    87→        } catch (e: Exception) {
    88→            Log.e(TAG, "Download failed", e)
    89→            emit(
    90→                DownloadProgress(
    91→                    bytesDownloaded = 0,
    92→                    totalBytes = 0,
    93→                    percentage = 0,
    94→                    speed = 0,
    95→                    status = DownloadProgress.Status.FAILED
    96→                )
    97→            )
    98→            throw e
    99→        }
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    /**
   103→     * 下载 DASH 格式视频
   104→     */
   105→    private suspend fun downloadDashVideo(
   106→        videoFormat: VideoFormat,
   107→        audioFormat: AudioFormat,
   108→        outputFile: File,
   109→        headers: Map<String, String>,
   110→        onProgress: suspend (DownloadProgress) -> Unit
   111→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   112→        val tempDir = File(outputFile.parent, "temp_${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   113→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   114→
   115→        try {
   116→            val videoFile = File(tempDir, "video.${videoFormat.ext}")
   117→            val audioFile = File(tempDir, "audio.${audioFormat.ext}")
   118→
   119→            // 下载视频流
   120→            Log.d(TAG, "Downloading video stream...")
   121→            downloadFile(videoFormat.url, videoFile, headers) { progress ->
   122→                onProgress(progress.copy(percentage = progress.percentage / 2))
   123→            }
   124→
   125→            // 下载音频流
   126→            Log.d(TAG, "Downloading audio stream...")
   127→            downloadFile(audioFormat.url, audioFile, headers) { progress ->
   128→                onProgress(progress.copy(percentage = 50 + progress.percentage / 2))
   129→            }
   130→
   131→            // 合并视频和音频
   132→            Log.d(TAG, "Merging video and audio...")
   133→            onProgress(
   134→                DownloadProgress(
   135→                    bytesDownloaded = 0,
   136→                    totalBytes = 0,
   137→                    percentage = 95,
   138→                    speed = 0,
   139→                    status = DownloadProgress.Status.MERGING
   140→                )
   141→            )
   142→
   143→            ffmpegHelper.mergeVideoAudio(videoFile, audioFile, outputFile)
   144→
   145→            Log.d(TAG, "Download completed: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   146→        } finally {
   147→            // 清理临时文件
   148→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   149→        }
   150→    }
   151→
   152→    /**
   153→     * 下载文件
   154→     */
   155→    private suspend fun downloadFile(
   156→        url: String,
   157→        outputFile: File,
   158→        headers: Map<String, String>,
   159→        onProgress: suspend (DownloadProgress) -> Unit
   160→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   161→        val requestBuilder = Request.Builder().url(url)
   162→
   163→        // 添加自定义头
   164→        headers.forEach { (key, value) ->
   165→            requestBuilder.header(key, value)
   166→        }
   167→
   168→        // B站需要 Referer 和 User-Agent
   169→        if (url.contains("bilivideo.com")) {
   170→            requestBuilder.header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com")
   171→            requestBuilder.header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36")
   172→        }
   173→
   174→        val request = requestBuilder.build()
   175→
   176→        client.newCall(request).execute().use { response ->
   177→            if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   178→                throw Exception("Download failed: HTTP ${response.code}")
   179→            }
   180→
   181→            val totalBytes = response.body?.contentLength() ?: -1L
   182→            var downloadedBytes = 0L
   183→            var lastUpdateTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   184→            var lastDownloadedBytes = 0L
   185→
   186→            response.body?.byteStream()?.use { input ->
   187→                FileOutputStream(outputFile).use { output ->
   188→                    val buffer = ByteArray(BUFFER_SIZE)
   189→                    var bytesRead: Int
   190→
   191→                    while (input.read(buffer).also { bytesRead = it } != -1) {
   192→                        output.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
   193→                        downloadedBytes += bytesRead
   194→
   195→                        // 每 500ms 更新一次进度
   196→                        val currentTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   197→                        if (currentTime - lastUpdateTime >= 500) {
   198→                            val timeDiff = (currentTime - lastUpdateTime) / 1000.0
   199→                            val bytesDiff = downloadedBytes - lastDownloadedBytes
   200→                            val speed = (bytesDiff / timeDiff).toLong()
   201→
   202→                            val percentage = if (totalBytes > 0) {
   203→                                ((downloadedBytes * 100) / totalBytes).toInt()
   204→                            } else {
   205→                                0
   206→                            }
   207→
   208→                            onProgress(
   209→                                DownloadProgress(
   210→                                    bytesDownloaded = downloadedBytes,
   211→                                    totalBytes = totalBytes,
   212→                                    percentage = percentage,
   213→                                    speed = speed,
   214→                                    status = DownloadProgress.Status.DOWNLOADING
   215→                                )
   216→                            )
   217→
   218→                            lastUpdateTime = currentTime
   219→                            lastDownloadedBytes = downloadedBytes
   220→                        }
   221→                    }
   222→                }
   223→            }
   224→        }
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    /**
   228→     * 格式化文件大小
   229→     */
   230→    fun formatFileSize(bytes: Long): String {
   231→        return when {
   232→            bytes < 1024 -> "$bytes B"
   233→            bytes < 1024 * 1024 -> String.format("%.2f KB", bytes / 1024.0)
   234→            bytes < 1024 * 1024 * 1024 -> String.format("%.2f MB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024))
   235→            else -> String.format("%.2f GB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024 * 1024))
   236→        }
   237→    }
   238→
   239→    /**
   240→     * 格式化速度
   241→     */
   242→    fun formatSpeed(bytesPerSecond: Long): String {
   243→        return "${formatFileSize(bytesPerSecond)}/s"
   244→    }
   245→}
   246→

1→package com.videodownload.app.utils
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit
     5→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.ReturnCode
     6→import com.videodownload.app.repository.AudioSegment
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     9→import java.io.File
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * FFmpeg 工具类
    13→ */
    14→class FFmpegHelper(private val context: Context) {
    15→
    16→    /**
    17→     * 提取音频
    18→     */
    19→    suspend fun extractAudio(videoPath: String): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    20→        val outputPath = "${videoPath}_audio.mp3"
    21→
    22→        val command = "-i \"$videoPath\" -vn -acodec libmp3lame -ar 16000 -ac 1 -ab 128k \"$outputPath\""
    23→
    24→        val session = FFmpegKit.execute(command)
    25→
    26→        if (ReturnCode.isSuccess(session.returnCode)) {
    27→            outputPath
    28→        } else {
    29→            throw Exception("Failed to extract audio: ${session.failStackTrace}")
    30→        }
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    /**
    34→     * 提取音频片段
    35→     */
    36→    suspend fun extractSegment(
    37→        inputPath: String,
    38→        startTime: Float,
    39→        endTime: Float,
    40→        outputPath: String
    41→    ): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    42→        val command = "-i \"$inputPath\" -ss $startTime -to $endTime -c copy \"$outputPath\""
    43→
    44→        val session = FFmpegKit.execute(command)
    45→
    46→        if (ReturnCode.isSuccess(session.returnCode)) {
    47→            outputPath
    48→        } else {
    49→            throw Exception("Failed to extract segment: ${session.failStackTrace}")
    50→        }
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    /**
    54→     * 获取音频时长
    55→     */
    56→    suspend fun getAudioDuration(audioPath: String): Float = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    57→        val command = "-i \"$audioPath\" -show_entries format=duration -v quiet -of csv=\"p=0\""
    58→
    59→        val session = FFmpegKit.execute(command)
    60→
    61→        if (ReturnCode.isSuccess(session.returnCode)) {
    62→            session.output?.trim()?.toFloatOrNull() ?: 0f
    63→        } else {
    64→            0f
    65→        }
    66→    }
    67→
    68→    /**
    69→     * 检测静音点
    70→     */
    71→    suspend fun detectSilence(audioPath: String): List<Float> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    72→        val command = "-i \"$audioPath\" -af silencedetect=noise=-30dB:d=0.5 -f null -"
    73→
    74→        val session = FFmpegKit.execute(command)
    75→
    76→        val silencePoints = mutableListOf<Float>()
    77→
    78→        session.allLogsAsString?.let { output ->
    79→            val regex = "silence_end: ([0-9.]+)".toRegex()
    80→            regex.findAll(output).forEach { match ->
    81→                match.groupValues[1].toFloatOrNull()?.let { silencePoints.add(it) }
    82→            }
    83→        }
    84→
    85→        silencePoints
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    /**
    89→     * 转换为 PCM 格式
    90→     */
    91→    suspend fun convertToPCM(audioPath: String): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    92→        val outputPath = "$audioPath.pcm"
    93→
    94→        val command = "-i \"$audioPath\" -ar 16000 -ac 1 -f s16le \"$outputPath\""
    95→
    96→        val session = FFmpegKit.execute(command)
    97→
    98→        if (ReturnCode.isSuccess(session.returnCode)) {
    99→            outputPath
   100→        } else {
   101→            throw Exception("Failed to convert to PCM: ${session.failStackTrace}")
   102→        }
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    /**
   106→     * 合并视频和音频
   107→     * 用于 DASH 格式视频
   108→     */
   109→    suspend fun mergeVideoAudio(
   110→        videoFile: File,
   111→        audioFile: File,
   112→        outputFile: File
   113→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   114→        val command = "-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" -i \"${audioFile.absolutePath}\" " +
   115→                "-c:v copy -c:a aac -strict experimental \"${outputFile.absolutePath}\""
   116→
   117→        val session = FFmpegKit.execute(command)
   118→
   119→        if (!ReturnCode.isSuccess(session.returnCode)) {
   120→            throw Exception("Failed to merge video and audio: ${session.failStackTrace}")
   121→        }
   122→    }
   123→}
   124→
